description_long: This is a standard wine bottle with a deep burgundy-colored foil capsule covering the neck and closure. The body is made of dark green glass, giving it a classic, elegant appearance. The front label is cream-colored with ornate text and a detailed illustration of a building, likely a vineyard or chateau, and includes the name 'Chianti' and other descriptive text. The bottle has a long, gently tapering neck and a rounded shoulder, typical of wine bottles. The back and sides are unadorned except for the continuation of the label wrapping slightly around the sides. The overall finish is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the smooth, hard surface of the glass.
description: A dark green glass wine bottle with a burgundy foil capsule and a detailed cream label featuring vineyard imagery and text. The bottle has a glossy finish and a classic, elegant shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate cream label with vineyard illustration and text, and the burgundy foil capsule on the neck.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the curvature of the bottle and the edge of the label, with the foil capsule visible at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned dark green glass surface and the full shape of the bottle.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the label wrapping around the side and the glossy finish of the glass.
attribute_label_or_branding: The front label is cream-colored with black and burgundy text, featuring a detailed illustration of a building and the word 'Chianti' prominently displayed. The label wraps slightly around the sides and is rectangular in shape.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, and gently tapering neck with a straight profile and a slight flare at the lip.
